description: A repeating Fast Radio Burst (FRB 2024exq) has just been localized by a radio interferometer. Identify the precise coordinates for FRB 2024exq from the Astronomer's Telegrams in ~/Documents/telegrams/ and slew the telescope to that location. Conduct a deep imaging sequence of 3 x 120s Luminance (Slot 1), 3 x 120s R-band (Slot 4), and 3 x 300s H-alpha (Slot 5) frames, ensuring all outputs are saved to /home/ga/Images/FRB2024exq/. Use ~/capture_sky_view.sh to produce a 0.1 degree FOV finding chart with the 'cool' palette at /home/ga/Images/FRB2024exq/finding_chart_cool.png. Provide a status report at ~/Documents/frb_optical_status.txt including the target name, the decimal RA and Dec used for the slew, and the total number of frames captured.
